focus: 365 Data Science analytics and data engineering projects
constraints: Hidden .agents and .codex are local junction roots; edit agent-skills as the canonical package.
Raw source-datasets files should remain immutable.
DuckDB is canonical and Streamlit replaces Tableau for repo dashboards unless the user asks otherwise.
For relational 365DS projects, Python orchestrates while SQL files define Bronze/Silver/Gold transformations where practical.
Customer Engagement and Tracking User Engagement use multi-block MySQL INSERT parsing; keep this capability for larger SQL dumps.
Tracking User Engagement translates Excel analysis steps into reproducible Python/Gold outputs unless a workbook is explicitly requested.
The Learning Hub is additive and reads approved project artifacts plus Gold marts; it does not restructure the five completed projects.
Learning Hub live AI is optional: configured providers/gateways require env or session keys, and no-key runs must fall back to local retrieval.
Learning Hub Chroma indexing is optional and must record backend/model/source-hash metadata; TF-IDF remains the default offline backend.
